Skill Path: Naturalist

You know most of natures' opportunities to heal.

While developing your skills in Nature you chose to focus specifically on Naturalist, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.WC4xLBGmBsdOdHWu]{Natural Medicine}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.l0h2RhJSOOtMKO0m]{Natural Physician}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}.
